title: 북한, 비핵화 대화 재개 의사 표명
summary: 북한이 국제 사회와의 비핵화 대화 재개에 긍정적인 입장을 밝혔습니다.
content: North Korea has expressed willingness to resume denuclearization talks. The announcement came through diplomatic channels recently. South Korea welcomed the positive signal and offered dialogue. The US State Department confirmed readiness for negotiations. China supported the move toward peace talks. Japan emphasized the importance of complete denuclearization. UN officials called the development encouraging. Previous talks had stalled for several years. This marks a potential breakthrough in regional diplomacy. Economic sanctions relief discussions may follow. Humanitarian aid could also be on the agenda. The international community remains cautiously optimistic.
